name: Candy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch or 9-inch square pan and set aside.
2. In a heavy saucepan, combine sugar, cocoa, and salt.
3. Stir in milk.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
5. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until syrup forms a soft ball when dropped into very cold water.
6. Remove from heat. Add vanilla and butter; stir until the mixture thickens and loses some of its gloss.
7. Pour into prepared pan.
8. Cool and cut into squares. Enjoy melting in your mouth. Note: Be sure to cook as described or it will not harden.
